evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Ensure models are tested, documented, and aligned with business definitions
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: A dedicated responsibility bucket for standards, quality, and governance (testing, documentation, data quality checks) dominates with no velocity/speed language present.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Enterprise SaaS analytics feeding business reporting without explicit financial reporting, audit, or regulatory language, so moderate.
evidence.collaboration_width: data engineers; platform teams; business stakeholders
evidence.data_team_maturity: Support semantic layer implementation with consistent metric definitions
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: An established governance framework, semantic layer, and named enterprise systems integration reflect a mature, specialized data organization.
evidence.jd_authorship: Implement data quality checks and governance standards within dbt models and Snowflake
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Named tools (dbt Cloud, Snowflake, Power BI, Fivetran) with precise practices (Kimball methodology, query tuning) make the day-to-day work very clear.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Partner with data engineers, platform teams, and business stakeholders
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Primary audience is the data platform/engineering function itself and reusable data products, placing this in internal_data.
evidence.autonomy_level: Identify process improvements and automation opportunities
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role designs new data products and identifies improvements (strategic) while also implementing governance standards and executing stakeholder requirements (execution), giving a mixed profile.
evidence.ai_role: Build data structures supporting AI/ML use cases with proper documentation
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate builds AI/ML-ready data structures (ai_enabler) and is also expected to use AI-assisted coding tools like Copilot/Claude (ai_user); per the tie-breaker, both signals present resolves to ai_enabler.
evidence.testing_framing: Ensure models are tested, documented, and aligned with business definitions
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing and data quality are framed as an owned responsibility ('ensure', 'implement') rather than just a listed skill.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Implement data quality checks and governance standards within dbt models and Snowflake
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: governance and quality checks are prominent but framed as operational reliability/standards rather than compliance or regulatory risk.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design and develop scalable analytical data models, curated datasets, conformed dimensions
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of designing new data products (greenfield) and implementing governance/quality standards on existing models (fix_scale) with no dominant direction.
